items.title: Rosalie Favell and the Search for Herself
items.summary: “I came out as a lesbian before I came out as an Indigenous woman,” the Métis artist told Hyperallergic.

items.title: A View From the Easel
items.summary: “My studio is a manifestation of my coloring book at eight years old.”

items.title: Required Reading
items.summary: This week: the Obama Center opens in Chicago, painting with Urdu script, glamour as protest, the woman who popularized astrology, an artist’s ode to pigeons, and more.

items.title: Seattle Art Museum Workers Vote to Unionize in Landslide Election
items.summary: The new union will represent over 130 full- and part-time employees across the institution’s three locations.
